---
title: "Bakdaulet Karakulov"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<!-- HERO -->
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-eyebrow">Available for Opportunities · Greater Boston, MA</div>
    <h1>Hi, I'm <span>Bakdaulet</span>.<br>I build data that drives decisions.</h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">
      Senior Software Developer & Business Intelligence Engineer with 7+ years
      turning complex data into powerful dashboards, automations, and analytics
      solutions across energy, logistics, and tech.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-tags">
      <span class="hero-tag">Power BI</span>
      <span class="hero-tag">Python</span>
      <span class="hero-tag">Microsoft Fabric</span>
      <span class="hero-tag">Azure</span>
      <span class="hero-tag">SQL</span>
      <span class="hero-tag">Power Platform</span>
      <span class="hero-tag">DAX · M</span>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="projects.html" class="btn-primary-custom">View My Work</a>
      <a href="contact.html" class="btn-outline-custom">Get In Touch</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ABOUT SECTION -->
<div class="section">

  <h2 class="section-title">About Me</h2>

  <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:2.5rem; align-items:start;">
    <div>
      <p style="font-size:1.05rem; line-height:1.75; color:#334155;">
        I'm a data-driven developer currently pursuing my 
        <strong>M.S. in Applied Business Analytics at Boston University</strong> (graduating May 2026),
        while working full-time as a Senior Software Developer at <strong>Umojo</strong> in Boston.
      </p>
      <p style="font-size:1.05rem; line-height:1.75; color:#334155;">
        My work sits at the intersection of engineering and analytics — I design pipelines, 
        build interactive dashboards, and automate workflows that give organizations 
        real-time visibility into what matters. I've shipped solutions for companies ranging from 
        Chevron to Boston-area startups.
      </p>
      <p style="font-size:1.05rem; line-height:1.75; color:#334155;">
        Originally from Kazakhstan, I've lived and worked across Central Asia, China, and the US —
        which has given me a global perspective and the ability to communicate across cultures and teams.
        I speak five languages.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="card-custom" style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
        <div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:.85rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.07em; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:1rem;">Current Role</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a;">Senior Software Developer</div>
        <div style="color:#64748b; font-size:.9rem; margin:.15rem 0 .75rem;">Umojo · Boston, MA · July 2022–Present</div>
        <p style="font-size:.88rem; color:#475569; margin:0; line-height:1.6;">Leading migration to Microsoft Fabric, developing Power BI dashboards and Power Platform workflows for real-time curb management analytics.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="card-custom">
        <div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:.85rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.07em; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:1rem;">Education</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:.98rem; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a;">M.S. Applied Business Analytics</div>
        <div style="color:#0ea5e9; font-size:.88rem; margin:.1rem 0 .75rem;">Boston University · 2025–2026</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:.95rem; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a;">B.Eng. Information Systems</div>
        <div style="color:#64748b; font-size:.88rem; margin:.1rem 0 0;">Suleyman Demirel University · Kazakhstan</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Stats -->
  <div class="stats-row">
    <div class="stat-item">
      <div class="stat-number">7+</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Years Experience</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-item">
      <div class="stat-number">5</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Industries Served</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-item">
      <div class="stat-number">5</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Languages Spoken</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-item">
      <div class="stat-number">3</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Countries Worked In</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SKILLS SECTION -->
<div style="background:#f1f5f9; padding:1px 0;">
<div class="section">
  <h2 class="section-title">Technical Skills</h2>

  <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr)); gap:1.5rem;">

    <div class="card-custom">
      <div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a; margin-bottom:.75rem;">📊 BI & Visualization</div>
      <div class="skill-grid">
        <span class="skill-badge highlight">Power BI</span>
        <span class="skill-badge highlight">DAX</span>
        <span class="skill-badge">M Language</span>
        <span class="skill-badge">Tabular Object Models</span>
        <span class="skill-badge">XMLA Endpoints</span>
        <span class="skill-badge">Dashboard Development</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="card-custom">
      <div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a; margin-bottom:.75rem;">☁️ Cloud & Data Engineering</div>
      <div class="skill-grid">
        <span class="skill-badge highlight">Microsoft Fabric</span>
        <span class="skill-badge highlight">Azure Data Factory</span>
        <span class="skill-badge">Azure Stream Analytics</span>
        <span class="skill-badge">SSIS</span>
        <span class="skill-badge">Real-Time Pipelines</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="card-custom">
      <div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a; margin-bottom:.75rem;">🛠️ Power Platform</div>
      <div class="skill-grid">
        <span class="skill-badge highlight">Power Apps</span>
        <span class="skill-badge highlight">Power Automate</span>
        <span class="skill-badge">SharePoint Online</span>
        <span class="skill-badge">Dataverse / CDS</span>
        <span class="skill-badge">Dynamics 365</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="card-custom">
      <div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a; margin-bottom:.75rem;">💻 Programming</div>
      <div class="skill-grid">
        <span class="skill-badge highlight">Python</span>
        <span class="skill-badge highlight">SQL</span>
        <span class="skill-badge">PowerShell</span>
        <span class="skill-badge">Django</span>
        <span class="skill-badge">NLP</span>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- Languages -->
  <div style="margin-top:3rem;">
    <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a; margin-bottom:1.5rem;">🌐 Languages</h3>
    <div style="max-width:500px;">
      <div class="lang-row">
        <span class="lang-name">Kazakh</span>
        <div class="lang-bar-wrap"><div class="lang-bar" style="width:100%"></div></div>
        <span class="lang-level">Native</span>
      </div>
      <div class="lang-row">
        <span class="lang-name">Russian</span>
        <div class="lang-bar-wrap"><div class="lang-bar" style="width:95%"></div></div>
        <span class="lang-level">Full Professional</span>
      </div>
      <div class="lang-row">
        <span class="lang-name">English</span>
        <div class="lang-bar-wrap"><div class="lang-bar" style="width:85%"></div></div>
        <span class="lang-level">Professional</span>
      </div>
      <div class="lang-row">
        <span class="lang-name">Turkish</span>
        <div class="lang-bar-wrap"><div class="lang-bar" style="width:80%"></div></div>
        <span class="lang-level">Professional</span>
      </div>
      <div class="lang-row">
        <span class="lang-name">Chinese</span>
        <div class="lang-bar-wrap"><div class="lang-bar" style="width:30%"></div></div>
        <span class="lang-level">Elementary</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>
```
